paragraphs_list.text: Meditations on the Excellencies of the Word of God

verse_parts.text: Who walk in the law of the
Who seek Him with the whole heart!
Oh, that my ways were directed
Then I would not be ashamed,
When I look into all Your commandments.
I will praise You with uprightness of heart,
When I learn Your righteous judgments.
Oh, do not forsake me utterly!
How can a young man cleanse his way?
By taking heed according to Your word.
With my whole heart I have sought You;
Oh, let me not wander from Your commandments!
Your word I have hidden in my heart,
That I might not sin against You.
With my lips I have declared
All the judgments of Your mouth.
I have rejoiced in the way of Your testimonies,
I will meditate on Your precepts,
I will delight myself in Your statutes;
I will not forget Your word.
I may live and keep Your word.
Open my eyes, that I may see
Do not hide Your commandments from me.
For Your judgments at all times.
Remove from me reproach and contempt,
For I have kept Your testimonies.
Your servant meditates on Your statutes.
My soul clings to the dust;
Revive me according to Your word.
I have declared my ways, and You answered me;
Make me understand the way of Your precepts;
So shall I meditate on Your wonderful works.
Strengthen me according to Your word.
Remove from me the way of lying,
And grant me Your law graciously.
I have chosen the way of truth;
, do not put me to shame!
I will run the course of Your commandments,
For You shall enlarge my heart.
Give me understanding, and I shall keep Your law;
Indeed, I shall observe it with
Make me walk in the path of Your commandments,
Incline my heart to Your testimonies,
Lit. Cause my eyes to pass away from
away my eyes from looking at worthless things,
So with MT, LXX, Vg.; Tg. Your words
Establish Your word to Your servant,
Turn away my reproach which I dread,
Behold, I long for Your precepts;
Let Your mercies come also to me, O
Your salvation according to Your word.
So shall I have an answer for him who
For I trust in Your word.
And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth,
For I have hoped in Your ordinances.
So shall I keep Your law continually,
I will speak of Your testimonies also before kings,
And I will delight myself in Your commandments,
My hands also I will lift up to Your commandments,
And I will meditate on Your statutes.
Remember the word to Your servant,
Upon which You have caused me to hope.
For Your word has given me life.
The proud have me in great derision,
I do not turn aside from Your law.
I remembered Your judgments of old, O
Indignation has taken hold of me
Because of the wicked, who forsake Your law.
Your statutes have been my songs
In the house of my pilgrimage.
I remember Your name in the night, O
I have said that I would keep Your words.
Be merciful to me according to Your word.
And turned my feet to Your testimonies.
I made haste, and did not delay
The cords of the wicked have bound me,
I have not forgotten Your law.
At midnight I will rise to give thanks to You,
a companion of all who fear You,
And of those who keep Your precepts.
You have dealt well with Your servant,
Teach me good judgment and knowledge,
Before I was afflicted I went astray,
But now I keep Your word.
Lit. smeared me with a lie
I will keep Your precepts with
good for me that I have been afflicted,
That I may learn Your statutes.
Your hands have made me and fashioned me;
Give me understanding, that I may learn Your commandments.
Those who fear You will be glad when they see me,
Because I have hoped in Your word.
in faithfulness You have afflicted me.
Let, I pray, Your merciful kindness be for my comfort,
According to Your word to Your servant.
Let Your tender mercies come to me, that I may live;
For they treated me wrongfully with falsehood;
I will meditate on Your precepts.
Let those who fear You turn to me,
Let my heart be blameless regarding Your statutes,
That I may not be ashamed.
My soul faints for Your salvation,
But I hope in Your word.
For I have become like a wineskin in smoke,
I do not forget Your statutes.
When will You execute judgment on those who persecute me?
The proud have dug pits for me,
They almost made an end of me on earth,
But I did not forsake Your precepts.
Revive me according to Your lovingkindness,
So that I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.
You established the earth, and it
They continue this day according to Your ordinances,
I would then have perished in my affliction.
I will never forget Your precepts,
For by them You have given me life.
For I have sought Your precepts.
The wicked wait for me to destroy me,
I have seen the consummation of all perfection,
Oh, how I love Your law!
You, through Your commandments, make me wiser than my enemies;
I have more understanding than all my teachers,
I have restrained my feet from every evil way,
That I may keep Your word.
I have not departed from Your judgments,
For You Yourself have taught me.
How sweet are Your words to my taste,
Through Your precepts I get understanding;
Therefore I hate every false way.
And a light to my path.
That I will keep Your righteous judgments.
Accept, I pray, the freewill offerings of my mouth, O
Yet I do not forget Your law.
The wicked have laid a snare for me,
Yet I have not strayed from Your precepts.
Your testimonies I have taken as a
I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes
Lit. divided in heart or mind
my hiding place and my shield;
For I will keep the commandments of my God!
Uphold me according to Your word, that I may live;
And do not let me be ashamed of my hope.
Hold me up, and I shall be safe,
And I shall observe Your statutes continually.
You reject all those who stray from Your statutes,
put away all the wicked of the earth
My flesh trembles for fear of You,
And I am afraid of Your judgments.
I have done justice and righteousness;
Do not leave me to my oppressors.
Do not let the proud oppress me.
Deal with Your servant according to Your mercy,
That I may know Your testimonies.
More than gold, yes, than fine gold!
The entrance of Your words gives light;
It gives understanding to the simple.
I opened my mouth and panted,
For I longed for Your commandments.
Look upon me and be merciful to me,
toward those who love Your name.
Direct my steps by Your word,
And let no iniquity have dominion over me.
Redeem me from the oppression of man,
That I may keep Your precepts.
Make Your face shine upon Your servant,
Rivers of water run down from my eyes,
Because my enemies have forgotten Your words.
I do not forget Your precepts.
Give me understanding, and I shall live.
Save me, and I will keep Your testimonies.
I rise before the dawning of the morning,
My eyes are awake through the
That I may meditate on Your word.
Hear my voice according to Your lovingkindness;
, revive me according to Your justice.
They draw near who follow after wickedness;
They are far from Your law.
I have known of old that You have founded them forever.
Consider my affliction and deliver me,
For I do not forget Your law.
Plead my cause and redeem me;
Revive me according to Your word.
For they do not seek Your statutes.
Revive me according to Your judgments.
I do not turn from Your testimonies.
I see the treacherous, and am disgusted,
Because they do not keep Your word.
Consider how I love Your precepts;
And every one of Your righteous judgments
Princes persecute me without a cause,
But my heart stands in awe of Your word.
As one who finds great treasure.
Seven times a day I praise You,
Great peace have those who love Your law,
Lit. they have no stumbling block
I keep Your precepts and Your testimonies,
Let my cry come before You, O
Give me understanding according to Your word.
Deliver me according to Your word.
For You teach me Your statutes.
My tongue shall speak of Your word,
Let Your hand become my help,
For I have chosen Your precepts.
I long for Your salvation, O
Let my soul live, and it shall praise You;
And let Your judgments help me.
I have gone astray like a lost sheep;
For I do not forget Your commandments.
